title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Syntel India Digital Technologies in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
